posts.author: CJG (Chris)
posts.cookedHtml:
hi there,

Work Management/Pro user here. I am currently building my team project templates to basically have everything set up to go once I go live. I am currently working on the dependencies but for some reason I’m not given the option to add dependency type (FS,SF,FF etc). I made sure the Dependency mode is set up to ‘Strict’. I followed the Monday.com article on dependencies but I still can’t figure it out.

Is any experiencing similar issueS?

posts.author: CJG (Chris)
posts.cookedHtml: FYI - I do have the dependent column linked to my timeline column

posts.author: Kim1988 (Kim van der Wijk #monday ambassador)
posts.cookedHtml:
I have the exact same thing. I filled in the feedback form under the article.
Must be a good explanation for but will come back to this article when I get an update
